name: Game Boy Color
description: Nintendo's color handheld platform and successor to the Game Boy. Bridges the original Game Boy library with color-exclusive handheld games.

eras.title: Color Transition Era
eras.description: Early period of colorized Game Boy releases, compatibility upgrades, and cross-generation handheld games.

eras.title: Late Handheld Era
eras.description: Color-exclusive games and late 8-bit handheld refinement before the Game Boy Advance fully takes over.
